page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor, delivering 96 dedicated physical cores at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 736.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 7.67 GB of RAM per core.

The primary accelerator hardware consists of eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, providing a combined total of 256 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance tradeoff. In single-core stress-ng testing, the CPU performance is relatively weak, placing in the bottom 25% of tested servers. However, the massive core count compensates in parallel workloads, with multi-core stress-ng performance ranking in the top 25% of tested systems.

Given the dense integration of eight enterprise-grade GPUs and substantial system memory, this instance represents a high-end hardware class designed for resource-intensive workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for large-scale parallel processing where GPU acceleration is critical. Appropriate workloads include deep learning training, high-performance computing, large-scale data science jobs, and complex parallel simulations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.24xlarge is a high-density, GPU-accelerated server instance designed for parallel computing workloads. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 96 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz, paired with 736.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs offering a total of 256 GB of VRAM. The instance lacks local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core CPU performance is weak, ranking in the bottom 25%, while multi-core performance is strong, placing in the top 25%. This hardware profile is optimized for parallelized, resource-dense workloads such as deep learning, data science, and high-performance computing simulations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 96 Intel Xeon cores, 736 GB RAM, and eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 256 GB VRAM for high-performance parallel computing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.24xlarge features 96 Intel Xeon cores, 736 GB RAM, and 8 NVIDIA V100 GPUs for parallel computing and deep learning.
tagline: A high-density GPU accelerator platform featuring eight enterprise GPUs and ninety-six dedicated cores for massive parallel computing workloads.

96 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.5 GHz.
736.0 GB of system memory providing 7.67 GB per core.
Strong multi-core performance offsetting weaker single-core speeds.
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions.
Designed for deep learning, data science, and parallel simulations.
